pattern: Flipping the leading 6 to a 9 always yields the largest result because the most-significant digit contributes the most to the number's value.
hints: Changing a digit earlier in the number has far more impact than changing one later — focus on the leftmost digit that can be improved.
The only beneficial change is 6 → 9; changing a 9 to a 6 reduces the number.
Convert to a string, replace only the first '6' with '9', then convert back to an integer.

edge_inputs.description: 9 precedes a 6 — must skip the 9 and flip the 6

stress.description: random numbers in [1, 10000] built only from digits 6 and 9
